title: Settings
subtitle: Manage your account and organization preferences

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.subtitle: Update your personal information and preferences
profile.emailHelp: Contact your administrator to change your email.
profile.languageDesc: Select your preferred language for the interface

projectSettings.enginesDesc: Select which AI engines to include by default when creating new runs
projectSettings.contentLocaleDesc: Select the language for AI-generated content in this project
projectSettings.sampleDesc: Set the default number of queries to sample per run
projectSettings.sampleHint: Each run will sample {{count}} queries by default

team.title: Team Members
team.subtitle: Manage your team and send invitations
team.inviteHint: Invite colleagues to collaborate on projects, review content, and monitor AI visibility together.

invite.title: Invite a teammate
invite.subtitle: Create or resend a Clerk invitation and assign AEOGEO access up front.

errors.failed: Could not send the invitation. Please try again.

apiKeys.warningText: Do not share your API keys publicly or commit them to version control. Rotate keys regularly for security.
apiKeys.aiKeysDesc: Manage API keys for AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, OpenRouter) used by your engine runs.
apiKeys.emptyText: Generate API keys for programmatic access to AEOGEO services.
apiKeys.noneYet: No tenant keys yet. Add a provider key to run engines on your own quota.

billing.title: AI Usage
billing.subtitle: Your organization's AI consumption this month
billing.warningMessage: You are approaching your usage limit. Contact your administrator for increased capacity.
billing.limitReached: Usage limit reached. Contact your administrator.

notifications.title: Notification Preferences
notifications.subtitle: Choose what notifications you want to receive
notifications.weeklyReportsDesc: Receive a weekly summary of your visibility scores
notifications.citationAlertsDesc: Get notified when your brand is cited by an AI engine
notifications.competitorMovementsDesc: Alerts when competitors gain or lose significant visibility
notifications.contentPublishedDesc: Notification when team members publish new content
notifications.teamActivityDesc: Updates about new members, role changes, and invitations

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Third-party connections for your workspace
integrations.avopStub: Web analytics integrations (Google Analytics, Yandex Metrica) are not included in this product scope.
integrations.noProjects: Create a project first to configure integrations.

ga.title: Google Analytics (GA4)
ga.description: Import traffic and engagement data from GA4
ga.propertyIdHint: Find this in GA4 Admin > Property Settings
ga.credentialsPlaceholder: Paste your service account JSON here
ga.credentialsHint: Create a service account in Google Cloud Console with GA4 read access

ym.title: Yandex Metrica
ym.description: Import traffic data from Yandex Metrica
ym.counterIdHint: Find this in your Yandex Metrica counter settings
ym.oauthTokenHint: Generate an OAuth token at oauth.yandex.com
